evals.prompt: Create a new OpenCode skill that helps me manage Docker containers via the CLI
evals.expected_output: A complete skill directory with SKILL.md containing proper frontmatter, usage instructions, and optionally bundled scripts for common Docker operations

evals.prompt: Improve the description of my existing data-analysis skill to trigger more reliably on CSV-related prompts
evals.expected_output: An optimized description field that balances specificity with broad applicability, following the guidelines for effective skill descriptions

evals.prompt: Set up an evaluation workflow for my web-scraping skill with test cases and benchmarking
evals.expected_output: A complete evaluation harness including test case structure, baseline comparison setup, timing data collection, and human review capabilities
